name: Louise Marie
sourceStatus: Briefing document plus public non-Airbnb references; Airbnb URL and host-approved photos needed
title: A seaside apartment shaped by a promise.
tagline: The Ostend stay with a romantic origin story and a bright coastal rhythm.
description: Louise Marie is the Ostend seaside chapter in the House of Wander collection, inspired by the promise Laurens made to Maaike early in their relationship.

listingHighlights.label: Seaside position
listingHighlights.value: Louise Marie should carry the brighter coastal side of the collection.

listingHighlights.label: Origin story
listingHighlights.value: The briefing ties the stay to a promise from Laurens to Maaike in the first week of their relationship.

listingHighlights.label: Practical layer
listingHighlights.value: Public web references suggest a modern Ostend apartment pattern, but final Airbnb facts must be confirmed by the team.

stayStory.title: The stay
stayStory.text: Louise Marie should feel light, coastal, and easy to understand: a seaside apartment within the larger House of Wander world.

stayStory.title: The story
stayStory.text: The romantic origin gives the page a human anchor without turning it into a private family page.

stayStory.title: The guest fit
stayStory.text: This page should eventually explain beach access, city convenience, bedroom setup, and who the apartment is best for.

stayStory.title: The booking path
stayStory.text: Airbnb remains the correct live booking handoff until direct booking is built and verified.

items: Send to Airbnb once URL is confirmed

Use House of Wander for story and guidance, not final transaction.
houseNotes: Guest count and room setup need confirmation.

locationNote: Louise Marie belongs to the Ostend coastal part of the collection. Exact neighborhood, beach distance, parking, and access details need confirmation from the live listing or hosts.

amigoStayPlan.text: Amigo can explain the promise and seaside angle in a concise guest-facing way.

amigoStayPlan.title: Stay comparison
amigoStayPlan.text: Later, Amigo can help guests choose between Ostend, Ghent, Blankenberge, and Stekene.

amigoPrompts.label: What is Louise Marie?
amigoPrompts.answer: Louise Marie is the Ostend seaside apartment in the collection, built around a romantic promise story from Laurens to Maaike. The exact Airbnb details still need confirmation.

amigoPrompts.label: Is it ready to book?
amigoPrompts.answer: Not from this prototype yet. The official Airbnb URL, approved photos, guest count, rules, and amenities need to be confirmed before this page can become booking-ready.

amigoPrompts.label: Which style fits it?
amigoPrompts.answer: Louise Marie is a strong candidate for the Coastal Light house style: brighter, airier, and more seaside than Casa Cabane's cinematic nature mood.
